caption: The scene features a single rectangular building positioned at the edge of the image near open land. It is surrounded by dense forest with varied vegetation types, showcasing a stark contrast between green and brown natural hues and curvilinear dirt paths.

The scene features a cluster of industrial buildings with rectangular shapes positioned side-by-side. It is set alongside a network of curvilinear roads, bordered by sparse vegetation, and exhibits a visual contrast between the beige terrain and the gray structures.

The scene features a cluster of industrial structures, including rectangular warehouses and a cylindrical chimney, arranged in a dense and interconnected layout. It is situated within an urban complex surrounded by grid-like roads, with minimal vegetation creating a stark visual contrast between light concrete surfaces and darker asphalt roads.

The scene features a single large industrial building with a scattered arrangement of smaller rectangular structures, characterized by metallic and concrete textures. It is embedded within an urban complex featuring grid-like road networks and sparse vegetation, highlighting a visual contrast between gray asphalt and blue tarp-covered surfaces.

The scene features multiple commercial buildings arranged side-by-side with expansive asphalt parking areas. It is situated within a suburban setting with sparse vegetation, intersected by arterial and grid-like roads, presenting a contrast between gray infrastructure and scattered green patches.

The scene features a single green pond adjacent to a cluster of agricultural fields with distinct rectangular plots. It is situated alongside grid-like arterial roads, with a clear visual contrast between lush green vegetation and golden-brown harvested fields.

The scene features a single residential area with multiple houses arranged in a neat grid pattern and adjacent small swimming pools. It is bordered by curvilinear roads, lush green lawns, and a contrasting gray asphalt texture, with a nearby pond adding visual variety.

There are multiple residential buildings arranged in a cluster with adjacent agricultural fields. The scene is characterized by a grid-like road pattern with a distinct contrast between the lush green fields and the gray asphalt streets.
